Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.connection
  2. ReactiveRedisConnection
  3. BooleanResponse

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse

Packages that use ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.connection
Connection package providing low-level abstractions for interacting with the various Redis 'drivers'/libraries.

  • Uses of ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse in org.springframework.data.redis.connection

    Methods in org.springframework.data.redis.connection that return types with arguments of type ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveKeyCommands.ExpireCommand>>
    ReactiveKeyCommands.applyExpiration(Publisher<ReactiveKeyCommands.ExpireCommand> commands)
    Expire a List of field after a given Duration of time, measured in milliseconds, has passed.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand>>
    ReactiveKeyCommands.copy(Publisher<ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand> commands)
    Copy keys one-by-one.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveKeyCommands.DelexCommand>>
    ReactiveKeyCommands.delex(Publisher<ReactiveKeyCommands.DelexCommand> commands)
    Delete a key based on the provided CompareCondition.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand>>
    ReactiveKeyCommands.exists(Publisher<ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand> keys)
    Determine if given key exists.
    default Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveKeyCommands.ExpireCommand>>
    ReactiveKeyCommands.expire(Publisher<ReactiveKeyCommands.ExpireCommand> commands)
    Expire keys one by one.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveKeyCommands.ExpireAtCommand>>
    ReactiveKeyCommands.expireAt(Publisher<ReactiveKeyCommands.ExpireAtCommand> commands)
    Set one-by-one the expiration for given key as a UNIX timestamp.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveStringCommands.GetBitCommand>>
    ReactiveStringCommands.getBit(Publisher<ReactiveStringCommands.GetBitCommand> commands)
    Get the bit value at offset of value at key.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveHashCommands.HExistsCommand>>
    ReactiveHashCommands.hExists(Publisher<ReactiveHashCommands.HExistsCommand> commands)
    Determine if given hash field exists.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveHashCommands.HSetCommand>>
    ReactiveHashCommands.hSet(Publisher<ReactiveHashCommands.HSetCommand> commands)
    Set the value of a hash field.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveHashCommands.HSetExCommand>>
    ReactiveHashCommands.hSetEx(Publisher<ReactiveHashCommands.HSetExCommand> commands)
    Set field-value pairs in hash at key with condition and expiration.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveListCommands.LSetCommand>>
    ReactiveListCommands.lSet(Publisher<ReactiveListCommands.LSetCommand> commands)
    Set the ReactiveListCommands.LSetCommand.getValue() list element at ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand.getKey().
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveRedisConnection.RangeCommand>>
    ReactiveListCommands.lTrim(Publisher<ReactiveRedisConnection.RangeCommand> commands)
    Trim list at ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand.getKey() to elements within ReactiveRedisConnection.RangeCommand.getRange().
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveKeyCommands.MoveCommand>>
    ReactiveKeyCommands.move(Publisher<ReactiveKeyCommands.MoveCommand> commands)
    Move keys one-by-one between databases.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveStringCommands.MSetCommand>>
    ReactiveStringCommands.mSet(Publisher<ReactiveStringCommands.MSetCommand> commands)
    Set multiple keys to multiple values using key-value pairs provided in commands.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveStringCommands.MSetCommand>>
    ReactiveStringCommands.mSetNX(Publisher<ReactiveStringCommands.MSetCommand> source)
    Set multiple keys to multiple values using key-value pairs provided in tuples only if the provided key does not exist.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand>>
    ReactiveKeyCommands.persist(Publisher<ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand> commands)
    Remove one-by-one the expiration from given key.
    default Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveKeyCommands.ExpireCommand>>
    ReactiveKeyCommands.pExpire(Publisher<ReactiveKeyCommands.ExpireCommand> commands)
    Expire keys one by one.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveKeyCommands.ExpireAtCommand>>
    ReactiveKeyCommands.pExpireAt(Publisher<ReactiveKeyCommands.ExpireAtCommand> commands)
    Set one-by-one the expiration for given key as a UNIX timestamp in milliseconds.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveHyperLogLogCommands.PfMergeCommand>>
    ReactiveHyperLogLogCommands.pfMerge(Publisher<ReactiveHyperLogLogCommands.PfMergeCommand> commands)
    Merge N different HyperLogLogs at sourceKeys into a single destinationKey.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveStringCommands.SetCommand>>
    ReactiveStringCommands.pSetEX(Publisher<ReactiveStringCommands.SetCommand> commands)
    Set key value pairs and Expiration.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveKeyCommands.RenameCommand>>
    ReactiveKeyCommands.rename(Publisher<ReactiveKeyCommands.RenameCommand> command)
    Rename key oldKey to newKey.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveKeyCommands.RenameCommand>>
    ReactiveKeyCommands.renameNX(Publisher<ReactiveKeyCommands.RenameCommand> command)
    Rename key oldKey to newKey only if newKey does not exist.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveStringCommands.SetCommand>>
    ReactiveStringCommands.set(Publisher<ReactiveStringCommands.SetCommand> commands)
    Set each and every item separately by invoking ReactiveStringCommands.SetCommand.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveStringCommands.SetBitCommand>>
    ReactiveStringCommands.setBit(Publisher<ReactiveStringCommands.SetBitCommand> commands)
    Sets the bit at offset in value stored at key and return the original value.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveStringCommands.SetCommand>>
    ReactiveStringCommands.setEX(Publisher<ReactiveStringCommands.SetCommand> commands)
    Set key value pairs and Expiration.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveStringCommands.SetCommand>>
    ReactiveStringCommands.setNX(Publisher<ReactiveStringCommands.SetCommand> values)
    Set key value pairs, only if key does not exist.
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveSetCommands.SIsMemberCommand>>
    ReactiveSetCommands.sIsMember(Publisher<ReactiveSetCommands.SIsMemberCommand> commands)
    Check if set at ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand.getKey() contains ReactiveSetCommands.SIsMemberCommand.getValue().
    Flux<ReactiveRedisConnection.BooleanResponse<ReactiveSetCommands.SMoveCommand>>
    ReactiveSetCommands.sMove(Publisher<ReactiveSetCommands.SMoveCommand> commands)
    Move ReactiveSetCommands.SMoveCommand.getValue() from ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand.getKey() to ReactiveSetCommands.SMoveCommand.getDestination().
